title: SRT-MALHEUR EXPRESS - 211info
text: MALHEUR COUNCIL ON AGING AND COMMUNITY SERVICES SRT-MALHEUR EXPRESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a variety of public transportation, including fixed routes and door-to-door. 842 SE 1st Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Fixed routes: Unrestricted Door to Door: Varies by service Hours: Transportation: Monday-Friday 6am-5pm, 1st Saturday of the month 9am-3pm, closed major holidays Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 881-0000 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 881-0000 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Malheur County Services: Public Transit Authorities Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
